title: Cobblemon Recall Beams [Cobblemon Sidemod]
description: Change the color of your Poké Ball's recall beam!
body:
# Change the color of your recall beam to any color you like with Recall Beams!

This sidemod literally does just that, nothing fancy!

![Cyan recall beam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04909eccd6fb1176e9fe1427a9636b2b828eb1a_0.webp)

You can change the color of the beam by **opening the Mod Menu list, looking for the Recall Beams mod, and editing the config.** The mod uses this hex code format _AARRGGBB (A: Opacity, R: Red, G: Green, B: Blue)_. There are online hex code color pickers to assist finding your preferred color's codes.

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f6b9a6c00785c1eadde9f4582db386b446da76_0.webp)

## IMPORTANT TO NOTE
- This mod requires the: [Cobblemon mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Mod Menu mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/versions), and [Cloth Config API.](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- This mod is client-sided. Beam color will be whatever color is set in the config settings.

### Credit goes to JustAHuman as the developer of this mod, and special thanks to NecroSo1 for porting this for the latest version of Cobblemon.
